title: 向虚拟机注入键盘输入
code:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# 1) 创建第二代测试虚拟机
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_keyboard_input'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null); if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
# 2) 键盘设备仅在虚拟机运行时存在; 必须先启动到 EnabledState=2
$rs=([wmi]$vm.__PATH).RequestStateChange(2); if($rs.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $rs.Job|Out-Null}
Start-Sleep -Seconds 3
# 3) 按 SystemName=VM.Name(GUID) 取 Msvm_Keyboard (GetRelated 亦可,但需虚拟机在运行)
$kbd=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_Keyboard -Filter ("SystemName='"+$vm.Name+"'")|Select-Object -First 1
$kbd=[wmi]$kbd.__PATH
# 4) 注入: 字符串 / 单虚拟键 / 按下-查询-释放 / 扫描码(uint8[] Set1 make+break)
$kbd.TypeText('Hello').ReturnValue                 # 0 成功; 仅 ASCII
$kbd.TypeKey([uint32]13).ReturnValue               # VK_RETURN 按下并释放
$kbd.PressKey([uint32]65).ReturnValue              # 按住 'A'
$q=$kbd.IsKeyPressed([uint32]65); $q.KeyState      # True
$kbd.ReleaseKey([uint32]65).ReturnValue            # 释放 'A'
$kbd.TypeScancodes([byte[]](0x1E,0x9E)).ReturnValue # Set1 扫描码: 0x1E='A'按下,0x9E=释放
# $kbd.TypeCtrlAltDel().ReturnValue                 # 无参, 发送 Ctrl+Alt+Del
# 5) 清理: 先强制关机(RequestStateChange 3)再 DestroySystem
$off=([wmi]$vm.__PATH).RequestStateChange(3); if($off.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $off.Job|Out-Null}
$d=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $d.Job|Out-Null}
output:
VM created: WMITEST_keyboard_input EnabledState=3
Keyboard while STOPPED (EnabledState=3): count=0
RequestStateChange(2 Enabled) rv=4096
  start job final JobState=7
EnabledState after start attempt=2
Keyboard found: ...Msvm_Keyboard.DeviceID="Microsoft:DE6CDC86-...",SystemName="D6857093-..."
  Layout=00000409 UnicodeSupported=True NumFnKeys=12
TypeText('Hello') -> 0
TypeKey(13 VK_RETURN) -> 0
PressKey(65 'A') -> 0
IsKeyPressed(65) -> rv=0 KeyState=True
ReleaseKey(65 'A') -> 0
TypeScancodes(0x1E,0x9E) -> 0
FINAL=PASS
CLEANUP force-off rv=4096
CLEANUP DestroySystem rv=4096
RESIDUAL=NO
notes: 前置条件: Msvm_Keyboard 设备仅在虚拟机处于运行态(EnabledState=2)时存在。停止态(EnabledState=3)下该虚拟机的 Msvm_Keyboard 实例数为 0,GetRelated('Msvm_Keyboard') 返回空。因此需先 RequestStateChange(2) 启动虚拟机才能取得键盘并注入。
空的第二代虚拟机(无操作系统、无引导介质)也能启动到 EnabledState=2(进入 UEFI/PXE 引导循环),足以让键盘设备出现并接受输入。
取键盘: Get-WmiObject Msvm_Keyboard -Filter "SystemName='<VM.Name GUID>'"。注意 VM.Name 为 GUID,而非 ElementName。键盘 DeviceID 固定为 Microsoft:DE6CDC86-E1FB-4940-801B-C3C1A26C4DA4。

方法签名(均返回 uint32, 0=成功): TypeText(string AsciiText,仅 ASCII,非 ASCII 返回 1) / TypeKey(uint32 KeyCode) / PressKey(uint32) / ReleaseKey(uint32) / IsKeyPressed(uint32)->OUT bool KeyState / TypeScancodes(uint8[] Scancodes) / TypeCtrlAltDel()无参。KeyCode 为 Win32 虚拟键码(VK_*)。
PressKey/ReleaseKey/IsKeyPressed 会将 VK_MENU(18)/VK_CONTROL(17)/VK_SHIFT(16) 映射到左键 VK_LMENU(164)/VK_LCONTROL(162)/VK_LSHIFT(160); 对这三个原始码 IsKeyPressed 始终返回 False。
TypeScancodes 使用 Set 1 扫描码字节数组: 高位(0x80)区分 make(按下)与 break(释放),如 'A' 的按下为 0x1E、释放为 0x9E。TypeScancodes 的 ValueMap 不含 4096(无 Job),其余方法含 4096。
清理时须先强制关机 RequestStateChange(3) 再 DestroySystem,否则运行中的虚拟机可能拒绝删除。
title_en: Injecting Keyboard Input into a Virtual Machine
notes_en: Precondition: the Msvm_Keyboard device exists only while the VM is in the running state (EnabledState=2). In the stopped state (EnabledState=3), the VM has zero Msvm_Keyboard instances and GetRelated('Msvm_Keyboard') returns empty. The VM must therefore be started with RequestStateChange(2) before the keyboard can be obtained and input injected.

An empty Generation 2 VM (no operating system, no boot media) can also start to EnabledState=2 (entering the UEFI/PXE boot loop), which is sufficient for the keyboard device to appear and accept input.

Obtaining the keyboard: Get-WmiObject Msvm_Keyboard -Filter "SystemName='<VM.Name GUID>'". Note that VM.Name is the GUID, not the ElementName. The keyboard DeviceID is fixed at Microsoft:DE6CDC86-E1FB-4940-801B-C3C1A26C4DA4.

Method signatures (all return uint32, 0=success): TypeText(string AsciiText, ASCII only, returns 1 for non-ASCII) / TypeKey(uint32 KeyCode) / PressKey(uint32) / ReleaseKey(uint32) / IsKeyPressed(uint32)->OUT bool KeyState / TypeScancodes(uint8[] Scancodes) / TypeCtrlAltDel() with no parameters. KeyCode is a Win32 virtual-key code (VK_*).

PressKey/ReleaseKey/IsKeyPressed map VK_MENU(18)/VK_CONTROL(17)/VK_SHIFT(16) to the left-hand keys VK_LMENU(164)/VK_LCONTROL(162)/VK_LSHIFT(160); for these three original codes, IsKeyPressed always returns False.

TypeScancodes uses a Set 1 scancode byte array: the high bit (0x80) distinguishes make (press) from break (release), for example 'A' is 0x1E for press and 0x9E for release. The ValueMap of TypeScancodes does not include 4096 (no Job), whereas the other methods do include 4096.
During cleanup, the VM must first be forcibly shut down with RequestStateChange(3) before DestroySystem, otherwise a running VM may refuse deletion.
code_en:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# 1) Create a Generation 2 test VM
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_keyboard_input'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null); if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
# 2) The keyboard device exists only while the VM is running; it must first be started to EnabledState=2
$rs=([wmi]$vm.__PATH).RequestStateChange(2); if($rs.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $rs.Job|Out-Null}
Start-Sleep -Seconds 3
# 3) Obtain Msvm_Keyboard by SystemName=VM.Name(GUID) (GetRelated also works, but requires the VM to be running)
$kbd=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_Keyboard -Filter ("SystemName='"+$vm.Name+"'")|Select-Object -First 1
$kbd=[wmi]$kbd.__PATH
# 4) Inject: string / single virtual key / press-query-release / scancodes (uint8[] Set1 make+break)
$kbd.TypeText('Hello').ReturnValue                 # 0 success; ASCII only
$kbd.TypeKey([uint32]13).ReturnValue               # VK_RETURN pressed and released
$kbd.PressKey([uint32]65).ReturnValue              # hold down 'A'
$q=$kbd.IsKeyPressed([uint32]65); $q.KeyState      # True
$kbd.ReleaseKey([uint32]65).ReturnValue            # release 'A'
$kbd.TypeScancodes([byte[]](0x1E,0x9E)).ReturnValue # Set1 scancodes: 0x1E='A' press, 0x9E=release
# $kbd.TypeCtrlAltDel().ReturnValue                 # no parameters, sends Ctrl+Alt+Del
# 5) Cleanup: first force shutdown (RequestStateChange 3) then DestroySystem
$off=([wmi]$vm.__PATH).RequestStateChange(3); if($off.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $off.Job|Out-Null}
$d=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $d.Job|Out-Null}
